basics.name: Caddy Liu 刘凯迪
basics.label: NYU Shanghai | Founder of Eggi | IMA & Business
basics.summary: NYU Shanghai student completing a dual degree in Business & Marketing and Interactive Media Arts. Founder of Eggi, an identity exploration app for teens. Passionate about technology, design, and human development.

education.area: NYU Stern School of Business · NYU Steinhardt · NYU College of Arts and Science

work.name: Eggi
work.summary: Built a self-identity app aligned with UNESCO SDG 4.7. Published on Apple TestFlight; iterating on user feedback. Delivered pitch deck to teachers, students, and investors at NYU entrepreneurship course.

work.name: ByteDance
work.summary: Designed and executed the first product launch campaign — attracted 30,000 participants. Built and managed 4 user communities (100+ members each). Sourced KOL partnerships across WeChat, Rednote, and Bilibili. Designed and hosted the company's first post-COVID global online team-building event.

work.name: New York University Shanghai
work.position: Research Assistant, Dept. of Management & Organizations
work.summary: Supported Prof. Tanya Tian's research on social media and organizational reputation. Conducted literature reviews across 20+ working papers; collected governance data for 850 companies.

work.name: NYU Shanghai
work.summary: Served four consecutive years; awarded Outstanding League Cadre 2021 & 2022. Launched 'Letters Alive' cross-campus exchange with 1,000+ participants. Hosted charity livestream raising ¥14,504. Launched first hybrid singing competition, growing registrations 74% YoY.

work.name: Chi Heng Foundation
work.summary: Designed writing-themed curriculum for rural left-behind children. Coordinated 24 volunteers across 3 schools, 65 students in Yunnan & Guangxi. Built sustainable operations commended by foundation director and NYU Shanghai Dean's Service team.

work.name: Stepping Stones
work.summary: Adapted curriculum using translanguaging and culturally responsive pedagogy for rural and migrant children. Reached 40+ students across Yunnan, Henan, and Shanghai over two consecutive semesters.

work.name: Deep Education Inc.
work.summary: Guide teenagers in learning methods and study plans. Conduct parent-child workshops to improve family communication for adolescents.

work.name: NYU Shanghai
work.summary: Facilitated discussions and provided assignment support for the 14-week first-year course, Design Your NYU Shanghai.

volunteer.summary: Assisted at the Forbes China Horizon Summit; supported conference check-in, interviews, and volunteer coordination.
Participated in the Elderly Oral History Program; interviewed elders and compiled commemorative albums.
